mapper.sql: id, user_id, name, logo, cover, category, price_level, rating, sales, delivery_time, distance, min_order, delivery_fee, badge, tags, status, is_recommended, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM merchant WHERE status = 0 ORDER BY sales DESC
SELECT FROM merchant ORDER BY status ASC, sales DESC
SELECT FROM merchant WHERE status = 0 AND category = #{category} ORDER BY sales DESC
SELECT FROM merchant WHERE status = 0 AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY sales DESC
SELECT FROM merchant WHERE status = 0 AND is_recommended = 1 ORDER BY sales DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE merchant SET is_recommended = #{isRecommended} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO merchant (user_id, name, logo, cover, category, price_level, rating, sales, delivery_time, distance, min_order, delivery_fee, badge, tags, status, is_recommended) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{logo}, #{cover}, #{category}, #{priceLevel}, #{rating}, #{sales}, #{deliveryTime}, #{distance}, #{minOrder}, #{deliveryFee}, #{badge}, #{tags}, #{status}, #{isRecommended})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM merchant WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
